title: Michael Saylor Responds to Scrutiny as Strategy Shares and STRC Hit 52-Week Lows
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Michael Saylor Responds to Scrutiny as Strategy Shares and STRC Hit 52-Week Lows

Michael Saylor took to X to defend Strategy's long-term Bitcoin-focused strategy after MSTR and its preferred shares hit new lows.

This post Michael Saylor Responds to Scrutiny as Strategy Shares and STRC Hit 52-Week Lows first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

title: ‘I See Volatility as Opportunity’: Bitcoin Tests Critical Support as Key Level Hangs in the Balance
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

‘I See Volatility as Opportunity’: Bitcoin Tests Critical Support as Key Level Hangs in the Balance

Bitcoin is testing the critical $58,000–$60,000 support zone for a third time, with a break below could trigger a deeper decline.

This post ‘I See Volatility as Opportunity’: Bitcoin Tests Critical Support as Key Level Hangs in the Balance first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

title: Strategy Stock (MSTR) Nearly Craters Another 10% as Securities Lawsuit Lands

Strategy Stock (MSTR) Nearly Craters Another 10% as Securities Lawsuit Lands

title: Trezor Academy Releases Documentary on Africa’s Bitcoin Economy, Opens Education Donations
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Trezor Academy Releases Documentary on Africa’s Bitcoin Economy, Opens Education Donations

Trezor Academy released a documentary highlighting Bitcoin adoption across Africa and launched a donation program to fund Bitcoin education initiatives in the Global South.

This post Trezor Academy Releases Documentary on Africa’s Bitcoin Economy, Opens Education Donations first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

title: Matt Corallo Urges Bitcoin Projects to Exit GitHub After Rust Lightning Ban
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Matt Corallo Urges Bitcoin Projects to Exit GitHub After Rust Lightning Ban

Senior developers including Andrew Poelstra highlighted broken merge scripts, hidden diffs, and unreliable tracking, pushing Bitcoin projects toward self-hosted Forgejo solutions.

This post Matt Corallo Urges Bitcoin Projects to Exit GitHub After Rust Lightning Ban first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Juan Galt.

title: Perception Exits Beta With Four Digital Asset Integrations
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Perception Exits Beta With Four Digital Asset Integrations

Perception exited beta and launched its digital asset narrative intelligence platform with integrations from BitGo, Swan, Relai, and Bitcoin Well, providing AI-driven market insights from over 1,000 curated industry sources.

This post Perception Exits Beta With Four Digital Asset Integrations first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.
